existing_strengths: Framework already exposes a modular Intelligence OS package with API, pipelines, workflow, graph, and tooling layers.
Tool catalog already exceeds 500 entries, but lacked explicit module-to-pipeline mapping and generated investigation packs.
Existing pipelines covered core seed types but not the broader recursive workflow library requested in the expansion brief.
missing_components_added: Structured manifest for tools, modules, pipelines, workflows, and architecture analysis.
Expanded library of 60+ advanced pipelines with recursive pivot metadata and reporting contracts.
Installer/bootstrap assets for Intelligence OS deployment and dependency orchestration.
upgrade_focus: Preserve existing framework assets while layering in registry enrichment instead of replacing current architecture.
Use generated metadata to drive future UI, installers, and autonomous orchestration upgrades.
